paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces disentangled attention, where each word is represented by separate content and position vectors, and attention weights are computed independently on content and relative positions. Also introduces an enhanced mask decoder that incorporates absolute positional embeddings during decoding to improve masked token prediction
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia (English Wikipedia dump), BookCorpus, OpenWebText, Stories (subset of CommonCrawl)
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Understanding (NLU), Natural Language Generation (NLG), question answering, text classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving language understanding and generation through better pre-training and fine-tuning techniques
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream NLP tasks using Scale-Invariant Fine-Tuning (SiFT)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Extends DeBERTa with 48 Transformer layers and 1.5 billion parameters, achieving superior performance on SuperGLUE benchmarks and surpassing human performance in macro-average scores
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia (English Wikipedia dump), BookCorpus, OpenWebText, Stories (subset of CommonCrawl)
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Understanding (NLU), Natural Language Generation (NLG), question answering, text classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling up pre-trained language models to achieve better generalization and performance on complex NLP tasks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream NLP tasks using Scale-Invariant Fine-Tuning (SiFT)
